sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if blue block can move UP
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
blue = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'b'][0]
print(f"Blue before: boundary={blue['boundary'][:4]}")

action(['UP'])

seg2 = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
blue2 = [n for n in seg2 if n['color'] == 'b'][0]
print(f"Blue after UP: boundary={blue2['boundary'][:4]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
